# Q 

2 

M 

WETCOAT

## Exterior / maintenance

### Spray on, rinse off, hydrophobic sealant.

Q²M WetCoat is an instant hydrophobicity booster designed to deliver immediate protection in a simple spray-on and rinse-off process. Despite its ease of use, it provides strong water repellency, chemical resistance, and self-cleaning properties on all exterior surfaces.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_wetcoat_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Instant hydrophobicity on all surfaces.

Q²M WetCoat simplifies exterior protection by delivering instant results during regular washing. It improves gloss and self-cleaning while being safe for paintwork, trim, metal, rims, and glass.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons32.svg)

INSTANT WATER REPELLENCY 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons69.svg)

SELF-CLEANING PROPERTIES 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons54.svg)

QUICK & EFFICENT 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mwetcoat.webp)

CAPACITIES 

500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML

Durability 

Gloss 

Beading 

Real World Lifespan

up to 12 weeks

PH Tolerance

ph 2-11

Consumption

80ml/car

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

WETCOAT

01
Wash the vehicle thoroughly. 

02
While the surface is still wet, 1 to 2 sprays of Q²M WetCoat,evenly, one panel at a time. 

03
Rinse immediately with strong water pressure. 

04
Do not allow the product to dry on the surface. 

05
Dry the vehicle using a suitable drying towel. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Can Q²M WetCoat be used on all exterior surfaces? 

Yes. It is safe for paint, trim, metal, rims and glass.

02
Does it need to be applied on a dry surface? 

No. It is designed to be applied on a wet surface.

03
How long does the protection last? 

Over twelve weeks, depending on conditions.

04
Is it safe for ceramic coated cars? 

Yes. It can be used on coated and uncoated vehicles.

05
Does it replace a ceramic coating? 

No. It provides temporary protection and maintenance benefits.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000265218-Q-M-WetCoat)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
